objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, Description__c, FlowName__c, Icon__c, Order__c, SObjectType__c, Status__c FROM sflib_RecordAction__c
SELECT Id, Name, Formula__c, Number__c, RecordAction__c, SObjectType__c FROM sflib_RecordActionCondition__c
SELECT Id, Name, LastName, FirstName FROM Contact
SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Status, Origin, Description, ContactId, AccountId FROM Case
